## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between RunPod and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-assisted optimization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is back on track with 4 new articles generated this week](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [RunPod is implementing article categorization and URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing a programmatic approach for GPU-specific content pages](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [RunPod is seeing success in AI SEO efforts, with revenue attribution increasing from 3% to 10%](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [The team is exploring AI tools (Profound, Scrunch) to optimize content for AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [4 new articles generated this week, awaiting editing](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Need 11-16 more content ideas approved for the coming week](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Implementing article categorization (e.g., articles/category/article-name)](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content generation for GPU-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Focus on creating content around popular use cases: PyTorch, Stable Diffusion, Comfy UI](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### SEO Performance and Tracking

  - [First published article showing positive signals: 1.57% CTR, 5.94 average position](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [New Looker Studio Dashboard created for tracking article performance](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [RunPod x GrowthX performance tab added for weekly updates](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Overall article dashboard shows keyword rankings and top queries](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### AI SEO Optimization

  - [RunPod's AI SEO revenue attribution increased from 3% to 10%](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Using tools like Profound and Scrunch to optimize for AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Focus on ranking for more technical, niche questions (e.g., "best cloud GPU provider for PyTorch")](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Exploring ways to increase citation rates in AI-generated responses (target: 15-20%)](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

### Bare Metal and Serverless GPU Offerings

  - [Major push for bare metal instant cluster offerings](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Clarification on differences between GPU pods (on-demand) and serverless GPUs (flexible, managed scaling)](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### AI Optimization Tools

  - [Profound: Provides insights but has limitations in prompt variety and contract terms](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Scrunch: More flexible, allows custom prompts and persona creation, offers content optimization suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emmett to review and approve 11-16 more content ideas for the coming week](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Jason to share the programmatic GPU content format for RunPod team's review](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Emmett to provide static pricing information for GPU offerings](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Sydney to continue updating the Looker Studio Dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Emmett to look into providing GrowthX team access to Scrunch for collaborative optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Team to explore creating content around popular use cases (PyTorch, Stable Diffusion, Comfy UI)](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Implement and test new article categorization and URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
